name:
large metal room
with porcelain machinery
description:
I'm in a large metal room
with porcelain machinery
hints: A room with unusual porcelain machinery. Examine it to understand what it is.
LOOK MACHINERY reveals this is a combined lavatory and mess hall - the aliens' version of a bathroom/cafeteria.
This is mainly a flavor/atmosphere room. Go EAST to return to the dormitory. The porcelain machinery is humorous - alien plumbing combined with food prep.

effects:
Message: combined lavatory & mess hall! Reminds me of my
old school's cafeteria! UGH!

notes: Combined lavatory and mess hall with porcelain machinery. A humorous room - the narrator compares it to their old school cafeteria. East exit returns to dormitory (room 23). Mostly atmospheric, but searching carefully may reveal hidden items.
